creator: tijl@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Fri, 2 May 2014 18:31:04 +0200 Antoine Brodin wrote:
> Patch approved.
> Can you think of any QA check for ports that use libtool but don't
> have USES=libtool (and didn't have USE_AUTOTOOLS=libtool) too?

Apparently the check doesn't work with fmake.  Can somebody approve the
attached patch to fix this?
